metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_3005
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Fig.9: "Immunogold EM localization of SH3P7 in the stratum radiatum in the CA1 region of the hippocampus"
- " Immunogold labelling for SH3P7 in the stratum radiatum within the CA1 region of the hippocampus was located predominantly in the postsynaptic site (Fig.9A). In contrast, presynaptic terminals were almost devoid of SH3P7-IR. As expected, synaptophysin-positive gold particles were observed at the presynaptic site (Fig.9C)."

Note: the image is quite difficult to decipher. There are independent reports of pre- and postsynaptic localization in other less resolution papers (see additional literature).. Experimental description: - "Pentobarbital-anaesthetized, 7-week-old, male Wistar rats ..."
